programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: After losing his position as a minor-league pitcher, Montgomery Brewster (Richard Pryor) learns his great-uncle has left him $300 million. To inherit it, Brewster must spend $30 million in 30 days under a complicated set of rules that forbid him from donating too much to charity or retaining any new assets when the period is up. Unable to share details about the will's odd conditions with anyone, Brewster sets out to spend his money under the stern eye of paralegal Angela Drake (Lonette McKee).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: When Cindy (Elaine Bromka) and her husband, Bob (Garrett M. Brown), have to leave town for a family emergency, there is only one person available to babysit for their three kids: Bob's lazy, carefree brother, Buck (John Candy). While he immediately gets along with the two younger children (Gaby Hoffman, Macaulay Culkin), Buck must change his bachelor lifestyle if he wants to be a responsible caregiver for the angst-filled teenager, Tia (Jean Louisa Kelly).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: In a distant galaxy, planet Spaceball has depleted its air supply, leaving its citizens reliant on a product called "Perri-Air." In desperation, Spaceball's leader President Skroob (Mel Brooks) orders the evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) to kidnap Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) of oxygen-rich Druidia and hold her hostage in exchange for air. But help arrives for the Princess in the form of renegade space pilot Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-man, half-dog partner, Barf (John Candy).

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: It's vacation time for outdoorsy Chicago man Chet Ripley (John Candy), along with his wife, Connie (Stephanie Faracy), and their two kids, Buck (Chris Young) and Ben (Ian Giatti). But a serene weekend of fishing at a Wisconsin lakeside cabin gets crashed by Connie's obnoxious brother-in-law, Roman Craig (Dan Aykroyd), his wife, Kate (Annette Bening), and the couple's two daughters. As the excursion wears on, the Ripleys find themselves at odds with the stuffy Craig family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: When Cindy (Elaine Bromka) and her husband, Bob (Garrett M. Brown), have to leave town for a family emergency, there is only one person available to babysit for their three kids: Bob's lazy, carefree brother, Buck (John Candy). While he immediately gets along with the two younger children (Gaby Hoffman, Macaulay Culkin), Buck must change his bachelor lifestyle if he wants to be a responsible caregiver for the angst-filled teenager, Tia (Jean Louisa Kelly).

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine (Markie Post) receives and accepts an unexpected marriage proposal from Officer Tony Giuliano (Ray Abruzzo). With Harry Anderson.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A pregnant Christine (Markie Post) tries in vain to reach her new husband in South America. With John Larroquette.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: In a distant galaxy, planet Spaceball has depleted its air supply, leaving its citizens reliant on a product called "Perri-Air." In desperation, Spaceball's leader President Skroob (Mel Brooks) orders the evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) to kidnap Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) of oxygen-rich Druidia and hold her hostage in exchange for air. But help arrives for the Princess in the form of renegade space pilot Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-man, half-dog partner, Barf (John Candy).

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: JoAnne squirms in Duncan's grasp; Lili needs these diagnoses by yesterday; the press is on to a scandal; Bardolph's triggered; Xander gets the joke; Orson has his heart stolen by someone with practice; Gary's Pippin is - it's too awful to say.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Wildfires hit the Valley, poisoning everything: marriages, neuro-psych evals, cheeseburgers, fifth homes; when someone poops in a hat, one A.I. friend to teens might just be the hero we've been waiting for; there's bad news about Linus Po.

programme.title: Summer Rental
programme.desc: After air traffic controller Jack Chester loses a plane (it's covered on his screen by a fly), he's told to take a break. Jack books his family into a plush resort, but it turns out that their lodgings are in a hut by the beach, and that's as good as the vacation gets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: It's vacation time for outdoorsy Chicago man Chet Ripley (John Candy), along with his wife, Connie (Stephanie Faracy), and their two kids, Buck (Chris Young) and Ben (Ian Giatti). programme.desc: Robert asks Ray if he can borrow a suitcase sitting on the stairway for his honeymoon; Ray explains he and Debra have been in an unspoken battle of wills since a weekend trip over who is responsible for putting the case away.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: An important job offer in New York forces Christine to choose between her career and Hayden.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Christine's network premiere party is scheduled the same night as Hayden's sports banquet.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: The stress of a long-distance relationship troubles Hayden; Luther and Dauber refinish Hayden's game-room floor.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden wins his first football game of the year and proposes to Christine on his new live television show.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Dauber's relationship with his girlfriend, Judy, is threatened when he becomes a Big Brother to an 8-year-old.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden hires Kelly's roommate to act as his daughter when Kelly refuses to attend his Father of the Year banquet.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Luther complains to Hayden about the lack of recognition for his contribution to the team's success.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Howard's wife, Shirley (Georgia Engel), comes to work in the athletic department and drives him crazy.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred buys a racehorse with an impressive history in hopes of breeding him.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred's niece, the spitting image of his late wife, visits the Sanford home.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Julio's sister and nephew stay with the Sanfords temporarily.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A fun time is had by all when Grady serves his friends, including two policemen, a salad made with marijuana.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred tries to sculpt a work of art from junk when he discovers the value of sculpture.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Grady must decide whether to lie when he receives too many Social Security checks.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Julio and the Sanfords decide to merge their junk businesses into one. However, they argue about who will be the star of their television commercial.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Grady steps in to protect the Sanford "treasures" when Lamont invites an ex-convict friend home.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack disguises himself as a woman to compete in a baking contest.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio hopes that Furley will bend the apartment rules when they place a stray cat on his doorstep.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's meddling father drops in unexpectedly.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri pretends she is married to ward off Dr. Kenderson's advances.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley become trapped in a freezer at Angelino's restaurant.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's old flame asks him for marital advice.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack feigns amnesia after wrecking Janet's car.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack checks into a hospital to have an embarrassing tattoo removed.
